name: Grand Skibidi Town
description: Grand Skibidi Town features gta style sandbox, drivable vehicles and big arsenal of weapons, your mission is to destroy given amount of skibidi toilets in order to successfully complete each level and unlock new weapons.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim R - Reload G - Grenade Space - Jump
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Action, Adventure, gta, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Skibidi, Skibidi Toilet, Unity3D
